resources.string: Font color: key=font_color value=#RRGGBB; overlay: key=back_color; or use font_color_progress/back_color_progress 0–100. Reset beautify → reset_zerotermux_beautify (same as menu Clear Style; do not set keys to def). Blurry text → text_shadow_enabled; blur → blur_enabled/blur_radius

Snowflake/snow → set_zerotermux_config key=isSnowflakeShow value=true|false; particle/rain → key=isRainShow (mutually exclusive). Sidebar background → mIsBackMenuVisible. Use set_zerotermux_config, do not edit menu XML

Before creating a menu, call get_zerotermux_left_menu and read xml_rules + builtin_menu_catalog. click must use a fixed prefix (java:/ztShell:/jumpUrl: etc.); bare pkg/mc/exit are forbidden. Copy full java: class names from the catalog; tag is a remark—do not change its meaning; write && as &&& in Shell. Prefer catalog items; never invent Config classes.
Each create_menu_package uses the localized AI menu name (e.g. AI Created) and creates a new package.

Default mirror is tsinghua. Call list_zerotermux_pkg_sources first, let the user pick, then switch_zerotermux_pkg_source with user_confirmed=true only after explicit approval. Overwrites sources.list and runs apt update/upgrade.

Multi-container same as left menu Container Switch. list_zerotermux_containers; create via create_zerotermux_container; switch via switch_zerotermux_container (restart required); delete via delete_zerotermux_container with user_confirmed=true. Cannot delete main or active container.

List ZeroTermux settings, beautify keys, UI effects, openpage ids, and zt commands. Call FIRST when unsure. category: all|settings|beautify|beautify_ui|pages|zt_commands|left_menu|pkg_source|containers|command_defs
Read ZeroTermux user settings (ZTUserBean), beautify SaveData, and UI effects (isSnowflakeShow/isRainShow).

Set one ZeroTermux config. Booleans: true/false or 1/0. Colors: font_color/back_color as #RRGGBB, or progress keys 0–100. Use reset_zerotermux_beautify to restore default beautify. Snowflake/particle: isSnowflakeShow / isRainShow (mutually exclusive). Confirm risky keys like isInternalPassage first.

Restore default beautify (same as left menu Clear Style): clears font/overlay colors and opacity, removes terminal background image/video, resets UI. Call when user asks to reset/clear beautify; do not set keys to def one by one.
Open an in-app page by page_id (same as zt openpage). Examples: zt_settings, zero_termux_settings, agent_ai_settings, editor (extras may include edit_path for file/dir)
Run a zt command via local socket (preferred over terminal). Examples: help, toast hello, openleft, openpage list, reboot, x11status. Confirm reboot/destructive actions.
Read menu list, xml_rules, and builtin_menu_catalog. Call BEFORE creating menu XML.
Create/update an AI menu package with valid zt-menu XML. MUST read get_zerotermux_left_menu first. Use java:/ztShell:/jumpUrl: prefixes; never bare pkg/mc/exit.
List Termux APT mirror options (same as left menu Switch Source). Default tsinghua; present options before switching.
Switch APT source after the user picks one. MUST set user_confirmed=true only after explicit approval. Overwrites sources.list and runs apt update.
List all Termux multi-containers (same as left menu Container Switch). Returns container_id, name, active, is_main.
Create a new Termux container (same as + on Container Switch page). Requires container_name; optional switch_after_create=true to switch immediately.
Switch to a container. App restart required for full effect; set restart_app=true to restart immediately.
Delete a container (cannot delete main or currently active). Requires user_confirmed=true.
List saved quick shell commands from left menu Command Definition (same as terminal selection Add Command).
Add a command definition. name=label, command=shell; append_newline=true equals UI auto-enter.
Update a command by command_id or name; optional new_name/command/append_newline.
Delete a command definition. Requires user_confirmed=true.
Run a saved command definition in the terminal.
Read the current terminal screen. ALWAYS call before describing terminal state, install progress, or command output. Do not guess.
Send a command to the terminal (newline appended by default). Waits for shell prompt (default up to 10 min). Describe results ONLY from the returned snapshot.
Send a special key or key combination to the terminal.
Run a zt command through the terminal (same as typing `zt …`). Judge success from terminal snapshot. Examples: help, openleft, openpage zt_settings
Filter: all, settings, beautify, beautify_ui, pages, zt_commands, left_menu, pkg_source, containers, command_defs
Optional list of keys to read
Optional JSON extras for webview url or editor path
Full zt command WITHOUT the `zt` prefix
Target AI package id (e.g. ai_created_1); default latest
Single group snippet to append before </zt-menu>
Localized AI menu create name (e.g. AI Created)
Switch active menu to created/updated AI package; default false
Group name to expand after update; default AI menu name; empty/false to skip
true only after user explicitly agrees
Container dir id, e.g. files, files1; call list_zerotermux_containers first
Container display name; container_id or container_name
Display name for the new container
Switch immediately after create; default false
Whether to restart app immediately after switch; default false
When true, append newline on run (UI auto-enter)
Text or shell command to send
Whether to append newline after command, default true
Max ms to wait for shell prompt after send; default 600000
enter, tab, escape, backspace, up, down, left, right, ctrl_c, ctrl_d, ctrl_l, ctrl_z
zt command without `zt` prefix, e.g. help or openpage zt_settings
=== Terminal snapshot (authoritative; do not invent; ignore stale history) ===
--- Visible screen (matches what the user sees) ---
Status: command may still be running, or prompt not yet returned
Status: awaiting confirmation (y/n or Enter required; tell the user and wait before send_terminal_command)
[Wait timed out (waited %1$ds) — command may still be running. Call read_terminal; if finished, continue from snapshot.]
[Terminal awaiting confirmation — explain to the user and wait for approval before send_terminal_command with y/n or Enter.]

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <zt-menu> <group name="Common"> <item tag="ZT Settings" name="Settings" click="java:com.termux.zerocore.config.mainmenu.config.ZTSettingsClickConfig" /> <item tag="Update sources" name="Update" click="ztShell:pkg update" autoRunShell="true" /> </group> </zt-menu>

string-array.name: zt_ai_left_menu_item_notes
string-array.item: tag is a remark; do not change tag meaning for java: items
name is display text; java: items may use tag only
icon applies to non-java clicks only; icon is ignored for java:

string-array.name: zt_ai_left_menu_forbidden
string-array.item: click=\"zt openpage …\" → use java:ZTSettingsClickConfig or startActivity:
Modifying program menu / default menu / main_menu_path.xml

string-array.name: zt_ai_left_menu_workflow
string-array.item: 2. Copy group/item from catalog or build from click_types examples
4. Do not switch_to_menu by default; user switches manually

resources.string: No AI menu package yet; create_menu_package will create one.
AI menu package saved separately; default menu unchanged; repeated create adds numbered packages.
Cannot modify program or default menu; configurable packages only
create_menu_package must be the localized AI menu create name
No AI menu package to update; use create_menu_package first
At least one <group name=\"…\"> is required
item \"%1$s\" invalid click: \"%2$s\"; use prefix %3$s or empty placeholder
java: click class name cannot be empty
item \"%1$s\" java class not in catalog: %2$s; copy from builtin_menu_catalog
item \"%1$s\" should not set icon for java: (ignored)
item \"%1$s\" must write && as &&& in Shell
item \"%1$s\" dialogConfirm applies only to ztShell:
At least one <item click=\"…\"/> is required
click=\"pkg\" is forbidden; use ztShell:pkg or java:…ClickConfig
Left menu Common Functions → Switch Source (SwitchSourceClickConfig)

string-array.name: zt_ai_pkg_source_workflow
string-array.item: 3. switch_zerotermux_pkg_source source_id=… user_confirmed=true after user picks

resources.string: Tsinghua TUNA mirror; recommended default in China
Official Termux mirror; prefer overseas or official packages
Switch command sent to terminal; wait for apt to finish
Left menu Common Functions → Container Switch (ContainerSwitchClickConfig)
Deletion is irreversible. Explain container name and consequences; call delete_zerotermux_container with user_confirmed=true only after explicit approval.
Permanently deletes all Termux data in that container (home, packages, etc.). Cannot be undone.

string-array.name: zt_ai_container_workflow
string-array.item: 2. Show container names and which is active
4. Delete: after user confirms, delete_zerotermux_container container_id=… user_confirmed=true

resources.string: Command Definition same as left menu. list/add/update/delete/run_zerotermux_command_defs*; delete needs user_confirmed=true. append_newline=true = auto-enter.
Deletion is irreversible. Explain name and shell to user; delete with user_confirmed=true after approval.

string-array.name: zt_ai_command_def_workflow
string-array.item: 3. run to test; update to edit; delete needs user_confirmed=true

resources.string: The main screen bottom terminal toolbar (Extra Keys + text input) can be hidden by the user. AI cannot restore it. read_terminal snapshots mark hidden; if the user says the keyboard is gone, tell them: right menu → Switch session → long-press Keyboard to show it again.
[Terminal toolbar hidden] Bottom keyboard/Extra Keys are not visible; AI cannot restore them. Tell the user in their language: right menu → Switch session → long-press Keyboard to show again.
Copy from builtin_menu_catalog; do not invent classes; icon ignored
dialog* only for ztShell; use &&& for &&
Edit ai_created package xml; do not change default menu path
Terminal font color; value as #RRGGBB or #AARRGGBB (e.g. #FFFFFF)
Blurs wallpaper/background only. User says background/wallpaper blur → this key
Makes terminal text blurry when on. Blurry text → set false
Terminal snow animation. Aliases: snowflake/snow/雪花/下雪. Mutually exclusive with isRainShow
Terminal particle/rain animation. Aliases: particle/rain/粒子/下雨. Mutually exclusive with isSnowflakeShow
Usually requires app restart; use openpage zero_termux_settings for full setup
Open app page; use list for all ids
